article.body_preview:
DHAKA, July 21, 2023 (BSS) - Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina today laid emphasis on an amicable end to the Ukraine war, saying international cooperation in this time of growing instability is clearly vital to the vulnerable among the global community to build resilience against future shocks.

verification.quote_best_match: "We had to limit import of non-essential and luxury items;
verification.judge_reasoning: The article contains the exact line "We had to limit import of non-essential and luxury items;" which explicitly describes a policy action to limit (i.e., reduce) imports. The statement is presented as a nationwide government measure, matching the country-level scope.
